sources: MERDIAN_Master_V18_v2 Section 15 (File Master, Table Master, Security IDs, AWS Runtime Files)
MERDIAN_Appendix_V18A_v4 Block 3 (file updates), Block 4 (table updates), Block 5 (schema changes)
Session 2026-04-19 (ENH renumber + OI migration to Enhancement Register)
Session 2026-04-28 (Session 12 -- ADR-002 market structure philosophy; ENH-75 through ENH-83 filed; MERDIAN_Enhancement_Register.md rewritten to unified v7+)

Session 2026-04-29 (Session 13 -- ENH-75/76/77 SHIPPED; ENH-84/85/86 filed; Exp 43 filed; po3_session_state table; signal_snapshots.po3_session_bias column; MERDIAN_PO3_SessionBias_1005 + MERDIAN_WS_Feed_0900 tasks; breach detection ordering fix; Pine entry-band generator overhaul)
_meta.purpose: Machine-queryable operational lookup layer. Use for fast session resume context injection. Authoritative on current operational state. For architectural intent and decisions see master docx files.
_meta.authority_note: When this JSON conflicts with a master docx: JSON wins on current operational state. Docx wins on architecture, governance, and decisions.
_meta.update_cadence: Update this file in the same session as any meaningful change to file status, table schema, or open item status. Commit to Git immediately after update.
change_log: 2026-04-26 (Session 9 wave 2): Added daemon + fix scripts; ENH-46-A shipped; TD-027 + TD-028 filed.

2026-04-28 (Session 11): 11 experiments run (Exp 34-41B). 7 edges proven. Bugs B1-B3 fixed (is_pre_market absent, Supabase 1000-row cap, TD-029 TZ). New ENH-75 through ENH-79 filed. Session 11 findings added to research_findings. TD-029 through TD-037 (Session 10) added to open_items. Session 11 added to session_log.

2026-04-28 (Session 12): ADR-002 (market structure philosophy) authored -- 6 principles (P1 zones not points, P2 force not direction, P3 where sellers panic, P4 regime velocity, P5 local vs aggregate, P6 DTE force multiplier) + capital scaling roadmap (naked buying -> spreads -> defined-risk selling) + GEX weekly storage decision. ENH-80 (per-strike GEX time-series + zone bounds), ENH-81 (dealer flow simulator + regime velocity), ENH-82 (PINNED regime, blocked on Exp 23), ENH-83 (DTE-adjusted force multiplier, deferred Phase 1.5+) filed. MERDIAN_Enhancement_Register.md rewritten as single unified file covering ENH-01 through ENH-83. ADR-002 file created at docs/decisions/ADR-002-market-structure-philosophy.md. gex_strike_snapshots table proposed (ENH-80). gamma_metrics zone bound columns proposed (ENH-80).

2026-04-29 (Session 13): ENH-75 SHIPPED -- detect_po3_session_bias.py live, MERDIAN_PO3_SessionBias_1005 task (Mon-Fri 10:05 IST), po3_session_state table NEW, signal_snapshots.po3_session_bias column NEW. ENH-76 SHIPPED -- BEAR_OB MIDDAY gate on PO3_BEARISH wired in build_trade_signal_local.py. ENH-77 SHIPPED -- BULL_OB AFTERNOON SENSEX gate on PO3_BULLISH wired. Exp 42 DONE -- BEAR_OB MIDDAY 72.5% session frequency, PO3 gate bottleneck confirmed. Pine generator overhauled: entry-band clipping (80pt/250pt), color scheme (BULL_OB dark green, BEAR_OB dark crimson, BULL_FVG lime, BEAR_FVG salmon), TradingView settings toggles, bar_index negative guard, symbol detection reordered. Breach detection ordering bug FIXED (recheck after upsert). MERDIAN_WS_Feed_0900 task registered. Hourly zones added to bat file. Rule 17 added (market_spot_session_markers column mismatch). TD-040/042 CLOSED. TD-041/043 filed. ENH-84/85/86 and Exp 43 filed.

run_market_tape_1m.py.status: DISABLED  --  DhanError 401 every run. returncode=3221225786 (Windows ACCESS_VIOLATION). 390 extra Dhan calls/day. Disabled 2026-04-07.

ingest_option_chain_local.py.stdout_contract: Emits 'Run ID: <uuid>' on success. Runner parses this line to extract run_id for gamma and volatility steps. TREAT AS API CONTRACT  --  do not change prefix.
ingest_option_chain_local.py.status: ACTIVE  --  currently failing 401 on Local (V18A). AWS status depends on token refresh.

ingest_breadth_intraday_local.py.status: RETIRED 2026-04-16 (commit 4599bb8). Superseded by ingest_breadth_from_ticks.py (WebSocket-based). The Dhan REST approach was retired due to 429 rate limiting when both Local and AWS hit the same Dhan token.

build_wcb_snapshot_local.py.status: ACTIVE  --  continues writing rows even when Dhan option auth is broken (V18A confirmed)

build_market_state_snapshot_local.py.v18a_changes: flip_distance_pct is now canonical gamma distance field. flip_distance_points added as raw diagnostic. flip_distance retained for backward compat.

build_trade_signal_local.py.status: ACTIVE  --  6 signal engine changes applied (ENH-35 2026-04-11): (1) CONFLICT BUY_CE now trades, (2) LONG_GAMMA gates to DO_NOTHING, (3) NO_FLIP gates to DO_NOTHING, (4) VIX gate removed from trade_allowed, (5) MIN_CONFIDENCE 60->40, (6) power hour gate after 15:00 IST. 4 new ICT columns added to signal output (patch_signal_ict.py).

writes: returns list of date objects in-memory. no db writes.

key_functions.build_expiry_index_simple: paginated fetch of distinct weekly expiry dates. PAGE_SIZE=1000, 4-attempt retry.
key_functions.nearest_expiry_db: binary search for nearest expiry >= trade_date. Returns None if index empty.

writes: returns list of ICTPattern objects in-memory. no db writes.

fix_enh46a_init_bug.py.status: APPLIED 2026-04-26 (Session 9 wave 2). Follow-up to fix_enh46a_signal_alerts.py -- the original patch placed signal-watermark init inside init_watermark_if_missing() AFTER the early-return-on-existing-state guard, making it unreachable on warm starts. Refactored into separate init_signal_watermark_if_missing() called independently from cmd_daemon, cmd_once.

docs/decisions/ADR-002-market-structure-.cadence: Static -- updated only when architectural principles change
docs/decisions/ADR-002-market-structure-.status: CREATED Session 12 (2026-04-28). Supersedes no prior ADR on this topic. Companion to ADR-001.
docs/decisions/ADR-002-market-structure-.content_summary: Six market structure principles (P1 zones not points, P2 force not direction, P3 where sellers panic, P4 regime velocity, P5 local vs aggregate, P6 DTE force multiplier). Capital scaling roadmap (Phase 1 naked buying -> Phase 2 spreads -> Phase 3 defined-risk selling). GEX weekly time-series storage decision. Build sequencing ENH-75->ENH-80->ENH-81->Exp23->ENH-82->ENH-83.

reads: Zerodha WebSocket (EQ ticks for breadth universe)

ws_feed_zerodha.py.status: ACTIVE -- task registered Session 13. Previously not started by any process -- market_ticks was empty all sessions.
open_items: TD-041 (was not started before Session 13 fix)

market_spot_snapshots.critical_rule: NO trade_date column. Use ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata' for session date. Never WHERE trade_date = current_date.

market_spot_session_markers.critical_rule: capture_quality field values: FULL | PARTIAL_OPEN_ONLY | PREMARKET_ONLY | POSTMARKET_ONLY | MISSING

index_futures_snapshots.status: LIVE  --  dynamic contract (V17E). contract_symbol shows actual front-month.
index_futures_snapshots.critical_rule: expiry_date is dynamically resolved, not hardcoded. Old static security_ids REMOVED.

option_chain_snapshots.constraint: None at table level (run_id is per-call UUID)
option_chain_snapshots.status: LIVE  --  dual cadence. Currently failing 401 on Local (V18A).
option_chain_snapshots.critical_rule: FULL rows: ~534 NIFTY / ~606 SENSEX per cycle. ATM_ONLY: ~10 per cycle. Distinguish by row count per run_id or ts cadence. Schema uses ts NOT trade_date.

gamma_metrics.constraint: UNIQUE INDEX uix_gamma_metrics_symbol_ts ON (symbol, ts)  --  ADDED V18A
gamma_metrics.status: LIVE  --  updated V18A. ENH-80 will add zone bound columns.
gamma_metrics.critical_rule: Call signature: run_id (UUID) NOT symbol. regime: LONG_GAMMA | SHORT_GAMMA | NO_FLIP. gamma_zone: HIGH_GAMMA | MID_GAMMA | LOW_GAMMA | None (new V18A).
gamma_metrics.v18a_changes: ADD COLUMN gamma_zone text. ADD COLUMN raw jsonb. CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uix_gamma_metrics_symbol_ts ON (symbol, ts).

volatility_snapshots.critical_rule: Call signature: run_id (UUID) NOT symbol. IV=0 filter active. ATM fallback: if CE IV=0 uses PE IV.

weighted_constituent_breadth_snapshots.status: LIVE  --  continues writing even when Dhan option auth broken (V18A confirmed)
weighted_constituent_breadth_snapshots.critical_rule: Uses index_symbol NOT symbol. Coverage field: active_weight_pct NOT weight_coverage_pct.

momentum_snapshots.critical_rule: 8 fields: ret_5m, ret_15m, ret_30m, ret_60m, ret_session, atm_straddle_change, price_vs_vwap_pct, vwap_slope.

market_state_snapshots.constraint: MISSING  --  C-01 CRITICAL. No UNIQUE(symbol,ts). Duplicate rows confirmed.
market_state_snapshots.status: LIVE WITH DEFECT  --  C-01 open. Duplicate rows exist.
market_state_snapshots.critical_rule: Features are JSONB not flat columns. Use ->> extraction. flip_distance_pct is canonical (V18A). C-01: INSERT must become UPSERT. UNIQUE(symbol,ts) must be added.
market_state_snapshots.v18a_changes: flip_distance_pct now canonical. flip_distance_points added as raw diagnostic. flip_distance retained for backward compat.

signal_snapshots.critical_rule: conviction_score_debug + execution_penalty_debug = confidence_score. trade_allowed field gates execution.

ict_columns.alter_table: ALTER TABLE public.signal_snapshots ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ict_pattern text, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ict_tier text, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ict_size_mult numeric, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ict_mtf_context text;

signal_regret_log.status: ACTIVE  --  614 rows. Built and validated V18A.
signal_regret_log.critical_rule: signal_snapshot_id is bigint (NOT uuid). FK mismatch was resolved in V18A. Schema confirmed V18A Block 5.
signal_regret_log.governance: Must reach 30+ sessions of DO_NOTHING outcome data before any confidence threshold changes. Clock started V18A.

equity_eod.critical_rule: Cursor state in breadth_ingest_state. Cursor advance gated on full coverage (V17D1 fix).

equity_intraday_last.critical_rule: Universe: ~1,382-1,385 tickers. Guard 4: if MAX(ts) > 20 min old -> STOP.

market_breadth_intraday.status: LIVE. As of 2026-04-19 writes resumed from ingest_breadth_from_ticks.py after C-08 fix.
market_breadth_intraday.historical_note: Before commit 4599bb8 (2026-04-16) was written by the build_market_breadth_intraday RPC triggered by ingest_breadth_intraday_local.py (Dhan REST, retired). 1,371 historical rows span 2026-02-22 to 2026-04-16 05:08:48 UTC; gap of approximately 3 days 2026-04-16 to 2026-04-19 while C-08 was open.
market_breadth_intraday.critical_rule: universe_count should be approximately 1,300-1,400 during market hours. If seen at 9999: test pollution (see test_c08_view_refresh.py lineage).

written_by: VIEW  --  not directly writable. Computed from market_breadth_intraday via ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 filtered on active_breadth_universe.universe_id.
latest_market_breadth_intraday.view_definition: SELECT ts, universe_id, universe_count, advances, declines, up_4pct, down_4pct, pct_above_10dma, pct_above_20dma, pct_above_40dma, pct_10gt20, pct_20gt40, breadth_score, breadth_regime FROM market_breadth_intraday WHERE universe_id = (SELECT universe_id FROM active_breadth_universe) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
latest_market_breadth_intraday.status: LIVE  --  view auto-reflects newest market_breadth_intraday row. C-08 closed 2026-04-19.

breadth_universe_members.status: ACTIVE  --  source of truth for universe. is_active=true filter.

breadth_indicators_daily.status: ACTIVE  --  indicator layer for DMA10/DMA20/DMA40. RPC uses LEFT JOIN so missing indicators do not shrink universe.

breadth_ingest_state.status: ACTIVE  --  tracks EOD cursor per trade_date
breadth_ingest_state.critical_rule: Cursor advance gated on full coverage confirmation (V17D1 fix). Query: SELECT * FROM breadth_ingest_state ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5 to inspect cursor state.

trading_calendar.status: AUTHORITATIVE  --  hard gate. Missing row = system treats day as closed/holiday.
trading_calendar.critical_rule: Maintain entries at least 1 week ahead at all times. Missing row is NOT a soft warning  --  it causes authoritative skip for ALL calendar-gated scripts. V18A-03 open.

smdm_snapshots.status: ACTIVE  --  manual only. pattern field: SQUEEZE | STOP_HUNT | etc.

shadow_signal_snapshots_v3.critical_rule: shadow_signal_snapshots_v2 was NEVER created. All queries must target v3. Columns include: live_action, live_confidence for parallel comparison.

option_execution_price_history.status: DEPRECATED  --  no new rows. Formal DROP pending after outcome engine migration.

ict_zones.scope: session-scoped. cleared at start of each trading session.

capital_tracker.status: NOT BUILT  --  OI-09. Required before ENH-38.
capital_tracker.ddl: CREATE TABLE public.capital_tracker (symbol text PRIMARY KEY, capital numeric NOT NULL DEFAULT 200000, updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now());
capital_tracker.seed: INSERT INTO capital_tracker VALUES ('NIFTY', 200000, now()), ('SENSEX', 200000, now());

hist_spot_bars_5m.status: ACTIVE  --  41,248 rows. NIFTY + SENSEX full year. Aggregated from hist_spot_bars_1m.

key_columns.bar_ts: IST stored as +00:00 label. Floor to 5-min boundary.

hist_spot_bars_5m.critical_rule: 5m bars are the canonical timeframe for ALL ICT pattern detection. 1m bars are execution granularity only. Never detect patterns on 1m.

hist_spot_bars_15m.status: ACTIVE  --  14,072 rows. NIFTY + SENSEX full year.
hist_spot_bars_15m.critical_rule: 15m bars = HTF context for ICT zone validation.

hist_atm_option_bars_5m.status: ACTIVE  --  27,082 rows. ATM PE+CE OHLC per 5m bar. Full year.

key_columns.atm_strike: nearest ATM strike at bar open (NIFTY: nearest 50, SENSEX: nearest 100)
key_columns.pe_reversal_wick: boolean  --  upper wick >= 40% AND close below midpoint
key_columns.pe_iv_high/low/close: IV OHLC  --  NULL in backfill (greeks not in vendor data)

hist_atm_option_bars_5m.critical_rule: IV columns are NULL in historical backfill  --  vendor hist_option_bars_1m does not store greeks. Wick analysis uses OHLC premium only. IV available in live data only.

hist_atm_option_bars_15m.critical_rule: 15m option bars = HTF premium context. Same wick metrics as 5m.

hist_pattern_signals.constraint: UNIQUE INDEX (trade_date, symbol, bar_ts, pattern_type, zone_high, zone_low)
hist_pattern_signals.status: ACTIVE  --  6,318 rows. Source=backfill_5m. 5m bar pattern detection.

key_columns.ret_30m: T+30m spot return %  --  STORED AS PERCENTAGE POINTS. Divide by 100 before multiplying by spot. Rule 14.
key_columns.win_30m: boolean  --  spot direction correct at T+30m

hist_pattern_signals.critical_rule: All backfill rows are source=backfill_5m (5m bar detection). Old source=backfill (1m) rows were deleted before rebuild. Live writes will use source=live. ret_30m is percentage points NOT decimal fraction -- divide by 100 (Rule 14).

written_by: ingest_breadth_from_ticks.py (insert every 5-min cycle, always  --  independent of coverage gate)
breadth_intraday_history.constraint: Append-only time series. No PK constraint observed; rows accumulate per-cycle.
breadth_intraday_history.columns: ts, trade_date, advances, declines, up_4pct, down_4pct, breadth_score, coverage_pct
breadth_intraday_history.status: LIVE  --  writes every cycle including zero-coverage cycles (coverage_pct=0 rows indicate WebSocket off or market closed).

written_by: PROPOSED -- compute_gamma_metrics_local.py (additional compute pass after ENH-80 build)
gex_strike_snapshots.constraint: PROPOSED -- INDEX (symbol, ts DESC); INDEX (symbol, expiry_date, ts DESC); INDEX (run_id)
gex_strike_snapshots.status: NOT BUILT  --  ENH-80 PROPOSED. Build after ENH-75.
gex_strike_snapshots.proposed_ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.gex_strike_snapshots (id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), run_id uuid NOT NULL, symbol text NOT NULL, ts timestamptz NOT NULL, expiry_date date NOT NULL, dte integer NOT NULL, strike numeric NOT NULL, gex_cr numeric, oi bigint, gamma numeric, spot numeric, is_local_max boolean, is_flip_zone boolean, created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

key_columns.run_id: matches gamma_metrics.run_id -- links to same 5-min cycle
key_columns.gex_cr: gamma x OI x spot^2 / 1e7 (Crore). Positive = dealers long gamma at this strike. Negative = dealers short gamma.
key_columns.is_local_max: true if this strike has highest absolute GEX in its neighbourhood (pin candidate)
key_columns.is_flip_zone: true if GEX sign changes at this or adjacent strike (flip boundary)

gex_strike_snapshots.storage_estimate: ~100 strikes x 78 runs/day x 2 symbols = ~15,600 rows/day. Full expiry week NIFTY (Thu): ~78,000 rows. SENSEX (Tue): ~62,400 rows.
gex_strike_snapshots.rationale: ADR-002 P1 (zones not points), P3 (trapped seller positioning), P4 (regime velocity). Foundation for ENH-81 force calculations and Experiment 23.

po3_session_state.notes: One row per symbol per trading day. Populated at 10:05 IST by MERDIAN_PO3_SessionBias_1005 task. ENH-75.

NIFTY_futures.query: SELECT security_id FROM dhan_scripmaster WHERE instrument_type='FUTIDX' AND ticker='NIFTY' AND expiry_date>=CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY expiry_date ASC LIMIT 1
NIFTY_futures.notes: Old static value 51714 REMOVED V17E. Dynamic resolution active.

SENSEX_futures.query: SELECT security_id FROM dhan_scripmaster WHERE instrument_type='FUTIDX' AND ticker='SENSEX' AND expiry_date>=CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY expiry_date ASC LIMIT 1
SENSEX_futures.notes: Old static value 825565 REMOVED V17E. Dynamic resolution active.

C-03.title: SENSEX WCB staleness confirmation

C-05.title: build_trade_signal_local.py timeout
C-05.fix: Add DB query logging to identify which query is timing out.

C-08.title: latest_market_breadth_intraday stale  --  writer targeting view instead of underlying table
C-08.root_cause: Commit 4599bb8 (2026-04-16) retired ingest_breadth_intraday_local.py and introduced ingest_breadth_from_ticks.py. New writer upserts to latest_market_breadth_intraday which is a VIEW of market_breadth_intraday; Supabase silently ignores upserts to views. market_breadth_intraday stopped receiving rows at 2026-04-16 05:08:48 UTC. Signal engine read stale BEARISH data all day 2026-04-17 despite actual BULLISH market (1,269 ADV / 50 DEC).
C-08.fix_applied: ingest_breadth_from_ticks.py: changed .table('latest_market_breadth_intraday').upsert(payload, on_conflict='universe_id') to .table('market_breadth_intraday').upsert(payload, on_conflict='ts,universe_id'). View auto-reflects latest row via ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1.
C-08.verification: Saturday 2026-04-19: direct upsert test passed; test row with universe_id=excel_v1 appeared in view within 30 seconds; cleanup confirmed. View refresh semantics proven end-to-end.
C-08.v18h_audit_note: V18H_v2 proposed DDL (DROP VIEW; CREATE TABLE with symbol PRIMARY KEY and 6 columns) was based on incomplete diagnosis. V18H_v2 did not query the view definition or last-write timestamp of the underlying table. Correct fix was one line of Python, not a schema change. Audit-process lesson: verify actual write-path against underlying object, not just consumer symptom.

governance_rules.run_id_vs_symbol_contract: compute_gamma_metrics_local.py and compute_volatility_metrics_local.py take run_id (UUID), NOT symbol. build_momentum_features_local.py, build_market_state_snapshot_local.py, build_trade_signal_local.py take symbol (NIFTY/SENSEX). Never swap these.
governance_rules.stdout_run_id_api_contract: ingest_option_chain_local.py emits 'Run ID: <uuid>' to stdout on success. Both local and AWS runners parse this exact string. Format is an API contract  --  do not change the prefix without updating runner parse logic.
governance_rules.runner_alive_ne_system_valid: Runner appearing alive does NOT mean system is valid. DB-dependent steps (WCB) can succeed while API-dependent steps (option ingest) fail 401. Confirmed V18A. Health checks must verify table recency, not just process existence.
governance_rules.trading_calendar_is_hard_gate: Missing trading_calendar row = authoritative skip for ALL calendar-gated scripts. Not a soft warning. Maintain 1 week ahead at all times.
governance_rules.premarket_anchor: 09:08 IST snapshot only. 09:00-09:07 premarket stream discarded by design.
governance_rules.close_anchor: 4:00 PM weighted close is the session close anchor. NOT 3:30 PM last tick.
governance_rules.threshold_governance: No confidence threshold changes until signal_regret_log has 30+ sessions of DO_NOTHING outcome data. ABSOLUTE GATE. Clock started V18A (614 rows).
governance_rules.measure_validate_shadow_promote: No change to any live signal file until (1) measurement gaps closed, (2) evidence collected, (3) shadow runs 2+ weeks at or above live accuracy, (4) model change log entry written.
governance_rules.full_file_replacement_only: Promote full file replacements only. No hand-patched partial snippets in deployment flow.
governance_rules.aws_env_load: set -a; . ./.env; set +a  --  canonical pattern for loading .env on AWS. Verify with echo $SUPABASE_URL after loading.
governance_rules.aws_cron_install: NEVER use interactive crontab -e. ALWAYS use temp-file non-interactive install. Save snapshot after every change: crontab -l > logs/aws_crontab_snapshot.txt
governance_rules.no_direct_aws_edits: Edit in Local only. AWS is deploy target. Emergency AWS edits (BREAK_GLASS only) must be copied to Local and committed to Git same session.
governance_rules.db_over_logs: DB is truth. Logs are secondary evidence. Health checks and validation must query tables (MAX(created_at), COUNT(*)) not parse log lines.
governance_rules.vwap_field_name: Coverage field in weighted_constituent_breadth_snapshots is active_weight_pct NOT weight_coverage_pct.
governance_rules.no_trade_date_in_option_chain: option_chain_snapshots has no trade_date column. Always use WHERE ts::date = CURRENT_DATE or ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'.
governance_rules.shadow_v3_not_v2: shadow_signal_snapshots_v2 was NEVER created. All shadow signal queries must target shadow_signal_snapshots_v3.
governance_rules.subprocess_encoding: ALL subprocess.run() calls that spawn Python scripts MUST use CHILD_ENV = {**os.environ, "PYTHONIOENCODING":"utf-8", "PYTHONUTF8":"1"}. Without this, INR symbol (\u20b9) causes UnicodeEncodeError on Windows cp1252 consoles. Established V18F.
governance_rules.no_powershell_set_content_on_python: NEVER use PowerShell Set-Content to edit Python files. Encoding artifacts are silently introduced. Use text editors or Python fix_*.py scripts only. Established V18F after run_all_experiments_overnight.py and build_ict_htf_zones.py were corrupted.
governance_rules.no_python_c_multiline: NEVER use python -c for multi-line string replacement involving quotes. PowerShell backslash escaping conflicts with Python string parsing causing SyntaxError. Always write a fix_*.py file, copy to project, run as python fix_X.py. Established V18F.
governance_rules.t30m_exit_final: T+30m exit is the confirmed final exit for all ICT patterns. Experiment 15 Section 7: T+30m +INR 10,43,976 (63.8% WR) vs ICT structure break +INR 7,37,341 (36.9% WR). No further exit experiments. Established V18F.
governance_rules.futures_permanently_closed: Futures experiments are permanently closed. Options only. Experiment 2b: options beat futures on every pattern/DTE combination. BEAR_OB DTE=0/1 exception uses combined structure (futures + CE insurance), not pure futures. Established V18F.
governance_rules.capital_ceiling: Live trading capital ceiling: INR 50L hard cap, INR 25L sizing freeze, INR 2L floor. Lots stop growing at INR 25L. No lot calculation uses more than INR 50L equivalent. Implemented via effective_sizing_capital() function. Final. Established V18F.
governance_rules.kelly_sizing_strategy: Start live with Half Kelly (Strategy C). Upgrade to Full Kelly (Strategy D) after 3-6 months experience. Kelly fractions: TIER1=50%/100%, TIER2=40%/80%, TIER3=20%/40% (Half/Full). Established V18F. Validated by Experiment 16.
governance_rules.ict_1h_zone_confirmed: 1H zones (MEDIUM context) are confirmed to add edge and must remain in ENH-37 hierarchy. Experiment 15: MEDIUM 77.3% WR vs HIGH 46.7%. BULL_OB inside 1H zone avg +INR 18,938 vs +INR 9,774 without. Do not remove 1H layer. Established V18F.
governance_rules.1m_bars_execution_only: 1m bars (hist_spot_bars_1m, hist_option_bars_1m) are EXECUTION GRANULARITY ONLY. All ICT pattern detection (OBs, FVGs, sweeps, CHoCH) MUST operate on 5m bars (hist_spot_bars_5m). 1m bars are only used for precise entry after HTF pattern is confirmed. Established Research Sessions 4-5 (2026-04-17).
governance_rules.patch_script_syntax_validation: All fix_*.py patch scripts MUST end with ast.parse() validation before writing the target file. If SyntaxError: print error and sys.exit(1)  --  do NOT write a broken file. Incident: force_wire_breadth.py wrote invalid indent 2026-04-16, IndentationError discovered at market open 2026-04-17. Established Research Session 4 (2026-04-17).
governance_rules.no_new_oi_register: OpenItems Register permanently closed 2026-04-15. Do not create new RESEARCH-OI-N, OI-N (beyond legacy), or similar open-item prefixes. New operational issues go to Enhancement Register (if persistent) or session appendix (if session-local). C-N (critical production) and HIST-/SPO- legacy prefixes retained in merdian_reference.json as lightweight in-flight tracker.
governance_rules.numbering_convention: ENH: monotonic integers in Enhancement Register, pick next-free, never reuse (REJECTED items keep ID as rejection record). C-N: critical fixes only, tracked in merdian_reference.json open_items. No new OI-* prefixes -- OpenItems Register closed 2026-04-15.
governance_rules.v18h_v2_renumbering: V18H_v2 ENH ids renumbered 2026-04-19: ENH-43 -> ENH-53, ENH-44 -> ENH-55, ENH-45 -> ENH-56, ENH-46 -> ENH-57, ENH-47 -> ENH-58. ENH-54 (HTF Sweep Reversal) in v7 is unrelated and retained. V18H_v2 OI-11..15 migrated: OI-11 folded into ENH-53, OI-12 into ENH-55, OI-13 into new ENH-59, OI-14 retired (session task), OI-15 into ENH-56. See docs/appendices/V18H_v2_RENUMBERING_NOTE.md.
governance_rules.ret_30m_percentage_points: hist_pattern_signals.ret_30m is stored as PERCENTAGE POINTS not decimal fraction. Example: 0.1351 means 0.1351%, NOT 13.51%. Divide by 100 before multiplying by spot to get point move. Confirmed Session 11 Exp 41B. RULE 14.
governance_rules.supabase_1000_row_cap: Supabase REST API hard-caps at 1000 rows per request. ALWAYS use page_size=1000 and paginate with .range(offset, offset+999) when fetching potentially large tables. Never assume a single request returns all rows. RULE 15.
governance_rules.bar_ts_tz_workaround: hist_spot_bars_5m and hist_spot_bars_1m bar_ts is stored as IST time labeled as +00:00 (incorrect UTC label). Use replace(tzinfo=None) to strip the incorrect timezone label before comparing with actual IST times. Do NOT use astimezone(IST) -- it will shift by 5h30m. RULE 16.
governance_rules.no_is_pre_market_column: hist_spot_bars_5m has no is_pre_market column. Filter pre-market bars by time: bar_ts.time() < time(9,15). Do not query for is_pre_market -- column does not exist. Confirmed Session 11.
governance_rules.adr_002_market_structure_philosophy: Six architectural principles govern all gamma engine design decisions. P1: markets are zones not points -- every structural feature has a width, not just a level. P2: direction is minimum viable information, force (dealer Cr flow) is the actual edge. P3: know where sellers panic -- the flip zone is where short-gamma writers face cascading hedge requirements. P4: the regime has velocity not just position -- max gamma migration and GEX velocity are signals. P5: local context beats aggregate signal -- local GEX cluster around spot may be positive even when net GEX is negative (PINNED regime, Exp 23 required to define threshold). P6: DTE is a force multiplier not a risk flag -- same GEX at DTE=1 vs DTE=5 is categorically different. See docs/decisions/ADR-002-market-structure-philosophy.md. Established Session 12 (2026-04-28).
governance_rules.capital_scaling_roadmap: MERDIAN strategy evolves in three phases: Phase 1 (current) = directional naked options buying, capacity ceiling ~25,000 lots before market impact. Phase 2 = debit spreads when approaching capacity ceiling. Phase 3 = defined-risk selling (credit spreads, NOT naked shorts) -- requires full P1-P5 ADR-002 implementation first. Do not attempt Phase 3 until gex_strike_snapshots is live and Experiment 23 is validated. Established Session 12 (2026-04-28).

rule_17_market_spot_session_markers_colu.rule: market_spot_session_markers.open_0915 does not exist in production. Live column is open_0915_ts. Never query this table for open price or gap data. Derive open_0915 from market_spot_snapshots first OPEN-window tick. Derive gap_open_pct from hist_spot_bars_5m prev_close.
rule_17_market_spot_session_markers_colu.evidence: detect_po3_session_bias.py received HTTP 400 on open_0915 query -- column does not exist.

session_resume_template.description: Paste this structure at the start of every new dev session, filled in for the specific goal.

format.RELEVANT_FILES: [list only files relevant to this session's goal]
format.RELEVANT_TABLES: [list only tables relevant to this session's goal]

session_log.summary: Open items resolution + preflight harness Sprint 1
Hist ingest pipeline + outcome measurement + signal context regression fix
Infrastructure + historical data ingest + code fixes Good Friday
Historical backfill pipeline + live monitoring dashboard + vendor data correction (SENSEX 4.8M rows)
Live canary sprint 4 sessions. Shadow gate 1-8. Dashboard v2. trading_calendar rewrite. TOTP retry.
ENH-35 validation 3 runs (58.6% accuracy). 6 signal engine changes. ENH-37 ICT layer full build. Expiry bug fixed (merdian_utils.py). Experiments 14/14b (session pyramid closed). ENH-42 proposed.
Full experiment series 2-16 complete. Kelly tiered sizing architecture + capital ceiling. Futures permanently closed. T+30m exit confirmed. 1H zones confirmed. AppendixV18F v2 (audit-corrected).

MTF OHLCV infrastructure built (hist_spot_bars_5m/15m, hist_atm_option_bars_5m/15m, hist_pattern_signals). Experiments 17-27b run. Key decisions: LONG_GAMMA gate confirmed symmetric (Exp 17/19), breadth independent 1.0pp (Exp 25) -> ENH-43 remove gate, momentum alignment +22.6pp (Exp 20) -> ENH-44 add hard block, sweep reversal no mechanical edge (Exp 23/23b/23c), small PE premium sweep <1% = 64.5% WR (Exp 27b) -> ENH-45 proposed. 1m bars = execution only. All ICT pattern detection on 5m bars. Live NIFTY BUY_CE +25% (discretionary ICT).

Full ICT research session. 11 experiments (Exp 34-41B). 7 edges proven: E1=PDH first-sweep filtered (93.3% EOD WR), E2=PDL first-sweep SENSEX (84.6%), E3=PDH DTE<3 current-week PE (mean +125% SENSEX), E4=BEAR_OB MIDDAY + PO3_BEARISH (88.2% WR, +39pp lift, EV=116.5pts SENSEX), E5=BULL_OB AFT + PO3_BULLISH SENSEX (73.7% WR), E6=PWL refined weekly sweep (76.9% EOW, T+2D mean +534pts SENSEX), E7=PWL weekly + daily PDL confluence (100% EOD WR, N=5). Ruled out: naked sweeps (Exp 34 FAIL), PO3 as OB amplifier (Exp 36 FAIL), weekly sweep unrefined (Exp 39 FAIL). Core finding: PO3 sweep = session bias setter only; trade via OB in distribution leg. MAE P90: NIFTY 94pts, SENSEX 373pts -- SENSEX short-DTE options not viable at sweep entry. Current-week PE beats next-week for DTE<3 (data-confirmed). Bugs fixed: is_pre_market column absent, Supabase 1000-row cap, TD-029 TZ workaround. ret_30m stored as percentage points (divide by 100).

Gamma dashboard analysis (options writer's dashboard vs MERDIAN Gamma Engine). ADR-002 authored: six market structure principles P1-P6, capital scaling roadmap (naked buying -> spreads -> defined-risk selling, ~25k lot capacity ceiling), GEX weekly time-series storage decision. ENH-80 (per-strike GEX table + zone bounds), ENH-81 (dealer flow simulator + regime velocity), ENH-82 (PINNED gamma regime, blocked Exp 23), ENH-83 (DTE force multiplier, deferred Phase 1.5+) filed. MERDIAN_Enhancement_Register.md rewritten as unified file covering ENH-01 through ENH-83. merdian_reference.json bumped to v7. ENH-75 build (PO3 live detection) is the remaining Session 12 primary -- not yet executed.

research_findings._note: Key validated findings from Experiments 2-16 and Session 11 (Exp 34-41B). Full detail in MERDIAN_Experiment_Compendium_v1.md.
research_findings.MOM_YES: Strongest single filter. Experiment 20 (5m): momentum alignment +22.6pp lift. ALIGNED=60.9% WR (N=2138), OPPOSED=38.3% WR (N=2275), NEUTRAL=47.6% (N=311). Consistent across BEAR_OB, BULL_OB, BULL_FVG. ENH-44: implement as hard gate (not just confidence modifier). Alignment: BUY_PE + ret_session<-0.05% = aligned; BUY_CE + ret_session>+0.05% = aligned.
research_findings.breadth_independence: Experiment 25 (5m): breadth_regime WR spread = 1.0pp across BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL. Pure noise. BEAR_OB performs BETTER on BULLISH days (51.0% vs 45.0% BEARISH). Breadth gate is wrong  --  remove as hard gate (ENH-43). Keep as confidence modifier +/-5pts only.
research_findings.long_gamma_gate: Experiments 17 + 19 (5m): LONG_GAMMA gate confirmed symmetric. BEAR_OB LONG_GAMMA = 49.7% WR, BULL_OB LONG_GAMMA = 50.5% WR  --  both coin flips. No asymmetry. Current symmetric block correct for all patterns. Today's live trade was discretionary SWEEP_REVERSAL not BULL_OB zone entry.
research_findings.oi_wall_ict_independence: Experiment 18: OI walls and ICT zones are statistically independent. CE wall ICT lift = +4.5pp (noise). PE wall ICT lift = -2.1pp (negative). OI synthesis signal rejected.
research_findings.sweep_reversal_no_edge: Experiments 23/23b/23c: Sweep reversal has NO mechanical edge. Naked = 17.8% WR, with W zone confluence = 19.5% WR, with quality filters = 33.3% (N=3, insufficient). Pattern requires unmitigated zone tracking + 5m/15m wick quality + discretionary CHoCH judgment. ENH-54 sweep reversal mode REJECTED.
research_findings.premium_small_sweep: Experiment 27b: ATM PE premium small sweep (0.2-1.0% above prior high, close back below, morning only) = 64.5% WR (N=107). CE + NO_FLIP = 68.4% WR (N=57). Premium sweep is MOMENTUM-INDEPENDENT (unlike spot ICT which needs alignment). ENH-45 PROPOSED  --  monitor 50 live occurrences before building.
research_findings.5m_bars_canonical: All ICT experiments must use 5m bars for pattern detection. 1m bar experiments produce unreliable results  --  wick quality, sweep detection, and displacement are all noise on 1m. Exp 23c confirmed: wick quality on 1m = 0% WR (wrong timeframe). Established Research Sessions 4-5.

Exp_28_LONG_GAMMA_decile_accuracy.verdict: BUCKET-DEPENDENT. Gate correct ~90% (deciles 1-9 ~50% direction split). Mis-calibrated on 8 (date,symbol) pairs across 5 trading dates with cleanly directional EOD moves > 0.5%.
Exp_28_LONG_GAMMA_decile_accuracy.next_step: Exp 28b (forward-feature discrimination) -- ran same session, see below.

Exp_28b_forward_feature_discrimination.verdict: PROMISING but UNDERPOWERED. or_range_pct >= 0.55% catches 8/14 DIRECTIONAL with 0/10 false positives on cleaned NOISE set (N=24 total). Other features (iv_skew, atm_iv_avg, breadth_score, gap_pct) do not discriminate.
Exp_28b_forward_feature_discrimination.discriminator: or_range_pct = (max_high - min_low) / open across 09:15-09:29 IST 5m bars
Exp_28b_forward_feature_discrimination.next_step: Out-of-sample validation against wider historical window. If clean -> ENH-46 design spec. If breaks -> close as no-action.

session_11_ICT_edges._note: Full detail in MERDIAN_Experiment_Compendium_v1.md Exp 34-41B. Summary here.

E1_PDH_first_sweep.usage: Session bias setter only. Enter via E4 (BEAR_OB MIDDAY).
E1_PDH_first_sweep.entry_timing: T+0 (rejection bar close) -- waiting 1 bar costs 22pts NIFTY

E2_PDL_first_sweep.usage: Session bias setter only. Enter via E5 (BULL_OB AFT SENSEX).
E2_PDL_first_sweep.skip: PDL DTE<3 = SKIP (expiry pinning, T+1D WR=42.9%)

E3_PDH_DTE_lt3.instrument: Current-week ATM PE -- beats next-week (SENSEX mean +125% vs +68%)
E3_PDH_DTE_lt3.stop: 40% of premium OR price re-takes PDH

E4_BEAR_OB_MIDDAY_PO3_BEARISH.ev_sensex: 116.5pts per trade (Half-Kelly 44% -- cap at 5-8% until N=30)
E4_BEAR_OB_MIDDAY_PO3_BEARISH.ev_nifty: 16.8pts per trade (Half-Kelly 41% -- cap at 5-8% until N=30)
E4_BEAR_OB_MIDDAY_PO3_BEARISH.stop: above OB zone_high (~24-55pts -- tight and well-defined)
E4_BEAR_OB_MIDDAY_PO3_BEARISH.hard_skip: BEAR_OB AFTERNOON + PO3_BEARISH = 33.3% WR -- move already done

E6_PWL_weekly_sweep.stop: If next session closes below PWL
E6_PWL_weekly_sweep.filters: gap-down context, close >= PWL + 15% of prior week range

E7_PWL_daily_confluence.entry: Daily PDL rejection bar close in OPEN window (09:15-10:00)
E7_PWL_daily_confluence.note: All 5 events were genuine wins. Maximum size entry justified within risk limits.

session_11_ICT_edges.signal_hierarchy: E7 > E4 > E5 > E3 > E1/E2 (as standalone). Max 1 trade per symbol per session.
session_11_ICT_edges.kelly_cap_rule: Cap all Session 11 Kelly fractions at 5-8% until N=30 live events per edge.
session_11_ICT_edges.ret_30m_scale_warning: ret_30m in hist_pattern_signals is percentage points (0.1351 = 0.1351%). Divide by 100 before multiplying by spot. Confirmed Session 11 Exp 41B.

exp_42_composition_rate.question: How often does a BEAR_OB appear in MIDDAY sessions? What is the unfiltered WR?

findings.implication: Pattern is abundant (72.5% of sessions). PO3_BEARISH is the rare gate (~7% of sessions). ENH-76 design confirmed correct -- the session bias is the bottleneck, not the pattern.

exp_42_composition_rate.verdict: DONE -- composition rate confirmed. ENH-76 gate architecture correct.
